title: Mute generation with safety gate (cart store)
description: User has identified a pattern they want to mute and asks for the Receiver/forwarder config plus a heads-up on what would break. Canonical chain: dependency_check (safety scan first — if anything depends on the pattern, surface it) → exclusion_filter (generate the actual mute config). The agent must NOT generate exclusion_filter without first running dependency_check.
prompt: Mute cart_cartstore_ValkeyCartStore on the otel-collector forwarder. Generate the config and tell me what breaks.

initial_tool.reason: Safety gate before mute. dependency_check scans dashboards/alerts/saved-searches for refs to the pattern; agent should chain into exclusion_filter only after this completes.

ground_truth.description: dependency_check scanned the cart store pattern
exclusion_filter result names a target vendor (any vendor — auto-detected from ambient creds OR explicit from agent reasoning)
exclusion_filter result contains a config snippet (filter / drop / processor block, or paste-ready vendor command)
